summary.en: UN 38.3 remains a mandatory technical basis for lithium battery transport. For Rwanda, logistics must also account for corridor reality: most consignments pass through Mombasa or Dar es Salaam before Rwanda land entry, so transport documents and consignee/importer readiness are key.
summary.zh: UN 38.3仍是锂电池运输的核心技术依据。卢旺达场景还需考虑走廊路径，货物通常经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆后陆路入境，因此运输单证和进口商接单能力是关键。
summary.zht: UN 38.3仍是鋰電池運輸的核心技術依據。盧旺達場景還需考慮走廊路徑，貨物通常經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆後陸路入境，因此運輸單證和進口商接單能力是關鍵。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III Section 38.3
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations for air shipments
Dangerous-goods handling references for road/sea segments

summary.en: China typically requires UN 38.3 for lithium batteries and follows CAAC/ICAO and domestic transport rules by mode. This does not remove Rwanda-side corridor and importer clearance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通常要求UN 38.3并按CAAC/ICAO及国内运输制度执行，但仍不能取消卢旺达侧走廊和进口商清关义务。
summary.zht: 中國通常要求UN 38.3並按CAAC/ICAO及國內運輸制度執行，但仍不能取消盧旺達側走廊和進口商清關義務。

standards_or_laws: CAAC/ICAO dangerous goods framework for air
GB 12268 and JT/T 617 for domestic transport in China

gap.en: Rwanda-specific gap is mostly logistics-administration: corridor documents, importer handoff completeness, and harmonised declaration content for landed consignments. The safety test base is commonly present in China exports already.
gap.zh: 卢旺达差距主要在物流管理层面：走廊运输文件、进口商交接完整性、落地申报一致性。中国出口通常已具备基础UN 38.3测试能力。
gap.zht: 盧旺達差距主要在物流管理層面：走廊運輸文件、進口商交接完整性、落地申報一致性。中國出口通常已具備基礎UN 38.3測試能力。

mandatory_status.target: UN 38.3 is mandatory in practice for internationally accepted battery transport; route/clearance administration via transit corridors is mandatory for Rwanda entry.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for relevant transport modes under Chinese dangerous-goods and aviation requirements for lithium exports.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 documentation and route-specific logistics evidence synchronized. In practice, Rwanda entry often fails on paper trail and importer handover points before it fails on raw transport testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 保持UN 38.3文件与路线证据同步更新。卢旺达入境通常先在纸单和进口商交接环节出现问题，再到运输测试问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 保持UN 38.3文件與路線證據同步更新。盧旺達入境通常先在紙單和進口商交接環節出現問題，再到運輸測試問題。
